---
title: "WRDS - Infogroup U.S. Historical Businesses Data"
page-layout: article
---

# WRDS - Infogroup U.S. Historical Businesses Data

**Provider:** WRDS

## Description

Historical establishment-level database for U.S. businesses with location, industry, and company records. Supports business demographics, economic geography, and longitudinal firm research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives

## Access notes

An individual WRDS account is required to access this data. A subset of this data is available in Data Axle (2003 - present). Previewing this data in Data Axle is encouraged.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/login/?next=/pages/get-data/infogroup/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
